description: Thesis-based condition detector. No direction, no pair-specific ranges. Universal market structure.

thesis_conditions.description: Cross → candles move from E100 → fan opens → BB expands → ENTER

cross.note: Cross is the setup event. Entry comes later when expansion confirms.

candle_distance.description: Price must be on correct side of E100 and moving away
candle_distance.note: Not a fixed pip threshold — varies by pair volatility. Just needs to be moving away bar over bar.

fan_expansion.description: E21 to E100 spread (full fan) must be growing
fan_expansion.note: E55 sits in the middle. Fan is the outer edges separating.

bb_expansion.description: Bollinger Band width must be growing — THE key differentiator
bb_expansion.note: Winners avg +0.10 over 5 bars, losers avg -0.03. Threshold 0.04 is conservative.

parallel_check.description: Fan expansion and BB expansion should be roughly parallel
parallel_check.note: If fan expands but BB contracts (or vice versa), setup is suspect.

EARLY_WARNING.description: Cross detected + RSI/Stoch extreme. Thesis not yet confirmed.
EARLY_WARNING.action: Scout starts watching this pair. No alert to validator yet.

CRITERIA_MET.description: Cross + candles away from E100 + fan expanding + BB expanding (Δ5bar > threshold).
CRITERIA_MET.action: Generate chart → send to TA for narrative → send package to validator for vision decision.

exit_thesis.description: Mirror of entry thesis. Contraction = exit.
exit_thesis.fan_contracting: E21 moving toward E100 — fan closing
exit_thesis.bb_contracting: BB width shrinking bar over bar
exit_thesis.trigger: Fan contracting + BB contracting = TIGHTEN stop. Both sustained 3+ bars = CLOSE.
exit_thesis.note: Guardian handles this in code. Position monitor confirms visually.

validated_by.manual_trades: 28 trades (18W/10L). Winners: BB Δ5bar avg +0.104. Losers: BB Δ5bar avg -0.022.
validated_by.vision_backtest: 98.6% TRADE precision (70W/1L) on V4 combined vision test.
validated_by.guardian_optimizer: +1,077p, 78.9% WR, PF 6.61 with optimal exit params.
validated_by.backtest_mfe: 3yr M15 data: 21+ pip avg MFE at thesis entries across all 13 pairs.
